changes: Lucid Dreaming is now acquired at level 14 (previously level 24).
Iron Will: Recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Clemency: Execution no longer interrupts action combos.
Holy Spirit: Execution no longer interrupts action combos.
Requiescat: Added additional effect 'Grants Blade of Faith Ready when the effect of Requiescat ends' with a duration of 30 seconds.
Holy Circle: Execution no longer interrupts action combos.
Confiteor: Added additional effect 'Restores own HP' with a cure potency of 400.
Blade of Faith: No longer a combo action with Confiteor; requirement of 'Blade of Faith Ready' added; added additional effect 'Restores own HP' with a cure potency of 400.
Blade of Truth: Added additional effect 'Restores own HP' with a cure potency of 400.
Blade of Valor: Added additional effect 'Restores own HP' with a cure potency of 400.
Divine Magic Mastery II: Now adds a healing effect to Confiteor.
Defiance: Recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Overpower: Area of effect changed from a cone to all nearby enemies.

Inner Release: Stacks now only apply to Fell Cleave and Decimate; effect 'Nullifies Stun, Sleep, Bind, Heavy, and most knockback and draw-in effects' changed to 'Grants Inner Strength, nullifying Stun, Sleep, Bind, Heavy, and most knockback and draw-in effects'.
Grit: Recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Flood of Darkness: Potency reduced from 130 to 100.
Blood Weapon: Now grants 5 stacks of the Blood Weapon effect; effect duration increased from 10 to 15 seconds.
Stalwart Soul: Now acquired at level 40 (previously level 72).

Living Dead: Added additional effect 'Restores HP with each weaponskill successfully delivered or spell cast' with a cure potency of 1,500. If max HP is restored before the timer ends, the effect changes to 'Undead Rebirth', allowing most attacks to not lower HP below 1.
Royal Guard: Recast time reduced from 10 to 3 seconds.
Perfect Balance: Can no longer be executed while under the effect of any Beast Chakra.
Jump: Animation shortened; now changes to Mirage Dive while under the effect of Mirage Dive Ready.
High Jump: Animation shortened; now changes to Mirage Dive while under the effect of Mirage Dive Ready.
Elusive Jump: Animation shortened.
Spineshatter Dive: Animation shortened.
Dragonfire Dive: Animation shortened.
Hide: Now dispels the effect of Doton upon execution.
Mug: Added effect 'Increases target's damage taken by 5%' for 20 seconds.
Trick Attack: Changed effect from 'Increases target's damage taken by 5%' to 'Increases damage you deal target by 10%'.
Aeolian Edge: Potency increased from 360 to 380; rear combo potency increased from 420 to 440.
Shukuchi: Animation shortened.
Doton: Potency increased from 70 to 80; duration reduced from 24 to 18 seconds.
Hakke Mujinsatsu: Combo potency increased from 120 to 130.
Armor Crush: Combo potency increased from 340 to 360; flank combo potency increased from 400 to 420.
Bhavacakra: Potency reduced from 400 to 350.
Phantom Kamaitachi: Potency increased from 550 to 600.
Melee Mastery: Now acquired at level 74 (previously 84).
Melee Mastery II (Level 84): New trait, increases potency of Spinning Edge to 220 and Gust Slash to 160.
Hakaze: Potency increased from 180 to 200.
Jinpu: Potency increased from 100 to 120.
Third Eye: Duration increased from 3 to 4 seconds.
Shifu: Potency increased from 100 to 120.
Gekko: Potency increased from 100 to 120; combo potency increased from 320 to 330; rear combo potency increased from 370 to 380.
Higanbana: Damage over time potency increased from 30 to 45.
Mangetsu: Combo potency increased from 110 to 120.
Kasha: Potency increased from 100 to 120; combo potency increased from 320 to 330; flank combo potency increased from 370 to 380.
Tenka Goken: Area of effect changed from a cone to all nearby enemies.
Oka: Combo potency increased from 110 to 120.
Yukikaze: Potency increased from 100 to 120; combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Midare Setsugekka: Potency reduced from 660 to 600; now guaranteed to land a critical hit.
Meikyo Shisui: Ranged weaponskills no longer count toward the effect.
Hissatsu: Shinten: Now acquired at level 52 (previously 62); potency reduced from 270 to 250.
Hissatsu: Yaten: Activation time adjusted to match other backstep actions.
Hissatsu: Kyuten: Now acquired at level 62 (previously 64).
Kaeshi: Higanbana: Potency reduced from 300 to 200.
Kaeshi: Goken: Potency reduced from 420 to 280; AoE changed from cone to all nearby enemies.
Kaeshi: Setsugekka: Potency reduced from 990 to 600; now guaranteed to land a critical hit.
Shoha: Potency reduced from 580 to 500.
Ogi Namikiri: Potency reduced from 900 to 800; now guaranteed to land a critical hit.
Kaeshi: Namikiri: Potency reduced from 1,350 to 800; now guaranteed to land a critical hit.
Way of the Samurai (Level 66): New trait, increases potency of Hakaze, Jinpu, and Shifu.
Way of the Samurai II (Level 84): New trait, increases potency of Gekko, Kasha, and Yukikaze.
Hissatsu: Kaiten: Removed.
Hell's Ingress: Duration of Enhanced Harpe increased from 15 to 20 seconds; animation shortened.
Hell's Egress: Duration of Enhanced Harpe increased from 15 to 20 seconds; animation shortened.
Regress: Animation shortened.
Repelling Shot: Range increased from 5 to 15 yalms; activation time adjusted to match other backsteps.
Battle Voice: No longer requires Mage's Ballad, Army's Paeon, or Wanderer's Minuet to be active.
The Wanderer's Minuet: Action changes to Pitch Perfect upon execution.
Heat Blast: Potency increased from 170 to 180.
Wildfire: Potency increase per weaponskill increased from 150 to 200.
Drill: Potency increased from 570 to 580.
Air Anchor: Potency increased from 570 to 580.
Pile Bunker: Potency increased from 650 to 680.
Crowned Collider: Potency increased from 750 to 780.
Chain Saw: Potency increased from 570 to 580.
Standard Step: Now categorized as a weaponskill.
Emboite: Now categorized as a weaponskill.
Entrechat: Now categorized as a weaponskill.
Jete: Now categorized as a weaponskill.
Pirouette: Now categorized as a weaponskill.
Cascade: Added effect changed to Silken Symmetry.
Fountain: Added effect changed to Silken Flow.
Windmill: Added effect changed to Silken Symmetry.
Reverse Cascade: Requirements changed to include Silken Symmetry.
Bladeshower: Added effect changed to Silken Flow.
Rising Windmill: Requirements changed to include Silken Symmetry.
Fountainfall: Requirements changed to include Silken Flow.
Bloodshower: Requirements changed to include Silken Flow.
Technical Step: Now categorized as a weaponskill.
Ruby Ruin: Recast increased to 3s, potency increased to 340.
Ruby Outburst: Recast increased to 3s, potency increased to 160.
Ruby Ruin II: Recast increased to 3s, potency increased to 380.
Ruby Ruin III: Recast increased to 3s, potency increased to 410.
Ruby Rite: Recast increased to 3s, potency increased to 510.
Searing Light: Now executed from the caster, not Carbuncle.
Ruby Disaster: Recast increased to 3s, potency increased to 190.
Ruby Catastrophe: Recast increased to 3s, potency increased to 210.
Ruin Mastery IV: Potency of Ruby Rite changed to 510.
Displacement: Animation shortened.
Stone: MP cost reduced to 200.
Aero: MP cost reduced to 200; duration increased to 30s.
Stone II: MP cost reduced to 200.
Regen: MP cost reduced to 400.
Cure III: AoE radius increased to 10 yalms.
Aero II: MP cost reduced to 200; duration increased to 30s.
Asylum: Range increased to 10 yalms.
Secret of the Lily: Lily generation reduced to every 20 seconds.
Stone III: Potency reduced to 220; MP cost reduced to 300.
Stone IV: Potency reduced to 260.
Afflatus Misery: Potency increased to 1,240; potency reduction after first enemy increased to 50%.
Liturgy of the Bell: Extra healing triggers when time expires or manual execution.
Ruin: MP cost reduced to 300.
Embrace: Target range increased.
Bio: MP cost reduced to 300.
Bio II: MP cost reduced to 300.
Sacred Soil: AoE radius increased to 10 yalms.
Expedient: Duration reduced to 10 seconds.
Combust: Duration increased to 30s.
Dosis: MP cost reduced to 300.
Soteria: Now grants 4 stacks; potency increased to 70%.
Addersting: Now grants max stacks upon entering instances.
PvP actions have been fully reworked.
Maximum HP and MP for all jobs has been adjusted.
Job gauges no longer display.
Damage modifiers for both damage taken and dealt have been adjusted on a per-job basis.
Damage taken and dealt will no longer be subject to RNG.
Resistance effects will no longer be applied upon the expiration of status afflictions.
Adrenaline Rush has been renamed to Limit Break and each job now has a unique limit break action.
Adrenaline gauge has been changed to the limit gauge.

new_content.name: The Porta Decumana
new_content.description: A trial featuring the battle with the Ultima Weapon, formerly part of The Praetorium.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: A new competitive PvP mode involving tactical crystal transport.

new_content.name: Duty Support
new_content.description: A new system allowing solo players to tackle main scenario duties with a party of NPCs.

new_content.name: Unending Codex
new_content.description: A compendium of vital information about in-game terminology and characters.

new_content.name: Adventurer Plate (Beta Version)
new_content.description: A personalized calling card interface for introducing yourself to other players.

new_content.name: A Mission in Mor Dhona
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

housing.name: Amaurotine Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall recreated from the memory of a city long since destroyed.

housing.name: Highland Flooring
housing.description: Floorboards designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Amaurotine Flooring
housing.description: Elegant stone flooring recreated from the memory of a city long since destroyed.

housing.name: Highland Pendant Lamp
housing.description: A pendant lamp designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Deluxe Highland Pendant Lamp
housing.description: A large pendant lamp designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Highland Chandelier
housing.description: A sumptuous chandelier designed to complement highland residences.

housing.name: Amaurotine Spire Chandelier
housing.description: A breathtaking light fixture resembling the once-proud spires of a city long since destroyed.

housing.name: Snowy Red Brick Bench
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Someone might have sat here, alone in the snow, thinking of warmer days since passed...

housing.name: Sweet Lawn Ornaments
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Giant, lifelike lawn ornaments that look tasty enough to lick.

housing.name: Damaged Ishgardian Wall
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A damaged wall preserved for posterity during the Ishgardian Restoration.

housing.name: Ishgardian Lamppost
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A lamppost of steel such as one might see lining an Ishgardian street. Authentically frigid!

housing.name: Alpine Open-air Bath
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A luxurious, outdoor bath designed in the alpine fashion.

housing.name: Ivy-covered Bridge
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A stone bridge tastefully hemmed with tendrils of creeping ivy.

housing.name: Garden Gate
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Curious what lies beyond the garden wall? The garden gate is here to help.

housing.name: Planter Set
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A vibrant arrangement of plant life bursting from a cluster of sturdy planters.

housing.name: Curved Marble Partition
housing.description: Furnishing: A gently curved, cream-colored partition with a white marble baseboard.

housing.name: Scholasticate Chair
housing.description: Furnishing: A wooden chair much like those found at Saint Endalim's Scholasticate.

housing.name: Scholasticate Bookshelf
housing.description: Furnishing: A laden bookshelf much like those found at Saint Endalim's Scholasticate.

housing.name: Royal Menagerie Phasmascape
housing.description: Furnishing: This advanced magitek contraption displays the splendor of Ala Mhigo's Royal Menagerie under a dying sun.

housing.name: Sea of Clouds Phasmascape
housing.description: Furnishing: This advanced magitek contraption displays the bevy of isles floating above Abalathia's Spine.

housing.name: Log Rack
housing.description: Furnishing: A lovely rack to organize your logs.

housing.name: Indoor Marble Fountain
housing.description: Furnishing: A fountain carved from deep-sea marble and whimsically decorated with Moogle statuettes.

housing.name: Eastern Canopy Bed
housing.description: Furnishing: Sleep in luxury under a canopy of softly blooming flowers from the Far East.

housing.name: Eulmoran Divan
housing.description: Furnishing: A cushioned settee expressly designed for contemplating one's more opulent sins.

housing.name: Trick Bookshelf Partition
housing.description: Furnishing: Pull the correct tome from the shelf to trigger the hidden door.

housing.name: Factory Pillar
housing.description: Furnishing: A rusted metal pillar with an uncanny resemblance to those found in the Copied Factory.

housing.name: Indoor Climbing Frame
housing.description: Table: A curious, latticelike structure that inspires rampant frolicking and climbing upon contact.

housing.name: Alpine Cabinet
housing.description: Table: A decorative cabinet designed in the alpine style.

housing.name: Scholasticate Table
housing.description: Table: A long desk much like those found at Saint Endalim's Scholasticate.

housing.name: Classic Dresser
housing.description: Table: A lavish vanity that hearkens back to days long past.

housing.name: Riviera Swinging-door Counter
housing.description: Table: Be advised not to let the doors of this handsome counter hit you on the way out.

housing.name: Steel Locker
housing.description: Table: A metal cupboard perfectly suited for stowing cleaning instruments, sundry items, and lithographs.

housing.name: House Fortemps Fireplace
housing.description: Table: A faithful replica of the fireplace found in Fortemps Manor.

housing.name: Cathedral Lectern
housing.description: Table: An uncanny recreation of the lectern used in Saint Reymanaud's Cathedral.

housing.name: Astrologicum Star Map
housing.description: Tabletop: An august chart rich with the secrets of the heavens.

housing.name: Wondrous Parfait
housing.description: Tabletop: A massive dessert layered with plenty of fresh fruit, whipped cream, and frozen confectionary.

housing.name: Bluefeather Astrolabos
housing.description: Tabletop: A hauntingly beautiful model of the universe.

housing.name: Small Blackboard
housing.description: Wall-mounted: Experience the joy of slapping two dusty erasers together again and again.

housing.name: Alpine Wall Lantern
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A wall lantern crafted in the alpine style.

housing.name: Emperor Portrait
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A commissioned portrait of the Garlean Empire's founding father, Solus zos Galvus.

housing.name: Azure Banner of Conflict
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A brilliant blue banner distributed at the Wolves' Den.

housing.name: Crimson Banner of Conflict
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A fierce red banner distributed at the Wolves' Den.

housing.name: Kweh-kweh Clock
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A charming chronometer designed to alert you of the time with a rousing "Kweh-kweh!"

housing.name: Ivy Curtain
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A natural veil of trailing greenery.

housing.name: Luminous Wooden Loft
housing.description: Wall-mounted: All the fun of a regular wooden loft, now with built-in light fixtures!

housing.name: Ironworks Tool Set
housing.description: Wall-mounted: A set of Garlond Ironworks' finest instruments.

housing.name: Imitation Alpine Window
housing.description: Wall-mounted: Who needs a house in the freezing peaks when you can mount a frosty windowpane upon your wall instead?

housing.name: Alpine Doormat
housing.description: Rug: A welcome mat designed to complement alpine residences.

glamour.name: Spotted Attire Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a spotted fedora and spencer. Cannot be used in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

glamour.name: Coeurl Beach Womenswear Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a flashy set of spotted swimwear. Fits: All ♀. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

glamour.name: Coeurl Beach Menswear Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a flashy set of spotted swimwear. Fits: All ♂. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

glamour.name: Archfiend Attire Coffer
glamour.description: A banded chest containing a full set of archfiend attire. Required level: 1. IL: 1. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

glamour.name: White Lace Parasol
glamour.description: A frill-rimmed umbrella perfect for any weather except rain. Use to unlock a white lace parasol.

glamour.name: Blue Blossom Parasol
glamour.description: A white umbrella printed with a charming pattern of blue flowers, moogles, chocobos, and more. Use to unlock a blue blossom parasol.

glamour.name: False Shaded Spectacles
glamour.description: These tinted lenses will place you at the forefront of trendiness─so long as you avoid bumping into anything while wearing them. Use to unlock a pair of false shaded spectacles.

glamour.name: False Classic Spectacles
glamour.description: Wear these for a classic look of intelligence. Use to unlock a pair of false classic spectacles.
